title: SpeedR Method, Spel Class
parameters: RotationSpeed	Specifies the tool rotation speed in degrees / second.
description: Specifies the tool rotation speed when ROT is used.
see_also:
Arc, Arc3, BMove, Jump3CP,, SpeedR, TMove

SpeedR Example

VB Example:

m_spel.SpeedR(100)

C# Example:

m_spel.SpeedR(100);
